characters.name: Bacon Hair
characters.description: Bacon Hair keeps the factory machines running. He has access to every corner of the building — even the waste storage room.
characters.suspicious_detail: He was seen carrying heavy drums near the river drain late at night, just before the pollution was discovered.
characters.innocent_explanation: The drums held old motor oil he was hauling to the certified recycling drop-off. His receipt checks out.
characters.culprit_explanation: Bacon Hair skipped the recycling fee and dumped chemical waste straight into the storm drain. Lab samples matched oil from the factory's machines.

characters.name: Ballerina Cappuccina
characters.description: Ballerina Cappuccina runs the popular café right on the riverbank. She uses lots of cleaning supplies to keep the place sparkling.
characters.suspicious_detail: Empty bottles of industrial cleaner were found hidden in the bushes near the river — the same brand she orders by the case.
characters.innocent_explanation: She threw out the empties during a big spring clean and forgot to sort them for recycling. No traces of her cleaners matched the river samples.
characters.culprit_explanation: Ballerina Cappuccina poured leftover cleaning chemicals behind her café for months. Runoff carried them straight into the river after every rain.

characters.name: Tung Tung Tung Sahur
characters.description: Tung works at the factory at night. He can go almost anywhere on site.
characters.suspicious_detail: Workers saw his van near the river drain at 3am — several times!
characters.innocent_explanation: Security cameras showed Tung was fixing broken machines. He just drove past the drain on his way back.
characters.culprit_explanation: Tung faked his night reports and poured chemicals into the river during storms to save money.
